title: Month Summary
description: Monthly financial summary with income, expenses, and expense treemap breakdown

widgets.title: Monthly Net Income
widgets.query: SELECT currency, SUM(amount) * -1 AS amount FROM postings WHERE LOWER(account) LIKE 'income:net:%' AND year = :year AND CAST(strftime('%m', transaction_date) AS INTEGER) = :month GROUP BY currency HAVING amount != 0 ORDER BY ABS(amount) DESC

widgets.title: Monthly Expenses
widgets.query: SELECT currency, SUM(amount) AS amount FROM postings WHERE account_type = 'Expenses' AND year = :year AND CAST(strftime('%m', transaction_date) AS INTEGER) = :month GROUP BY currency HAVING amount != 0 ORDER BY ABS(amount) DESC

widgets.title: Monthly Savings
widgets.query: SELECT currency, SUM(amount) * -1 AS amount FROM postings WHERE (LOWER(account) LIKE 'income:net:%' OR LOWER(account) LIKE 'expenses:%') AND year = :year AND CAST(strftime('%m', transaction_date) AS INTEGER) = :month GROUP BY currency HAVING amount != 0 ORDER BY ABS(amount) DESC
